properties.inscription:
Inscription 1

Bata-Tisaha sagasa.
[The cave of] lord Tissa, [is given] to the Sangha.

Inscription 2

Si[!*] Amataya Ba-
-rayaha upa.saka
Nakayaha mataya Laci-
-ya lene catudisika saga-
-hataye niyate

Hail ! The cave of Laci, the mother of the minister
